name: @juanshe/studio-electron
description: 卷舍 桌面客户端外壳(Electron):无边框原生窗 + 内嵌后端 + 无整页刷新 + 缩放

scripts.pack:mac: npm run preflight && npm run prepare:resources && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64
scripts.pack:win: npm run preflight && npm run prepare:resources && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --x64
scripts.pack:dir: npm run preflight && npm run prepare:resources && npm run build && electron-builder --dir
